title: Implement Session Persistence and Context Display
description: Build session management to persist and restore application state across launches. Save: open view, scroll positions, expanded panels, filter selections, active ticket. Display session context in header: session name, duration, last activity. Support multiple named sessions.
acceptance_criteria: Application state serialized to SQLite sessions table on change
State restored on app launch with smooth transitions
Session includes: current route, kanban filters, scroll positions
Header displays session name with edit-on-click
Duration shows time since session created
Last activity timestamp updates on any user action
Session switcher dropdown to switch between named sessions
New Session button creates fresh state, preserves old
agent_output: SessionView with timeline of decisions/context/markers/persona entries, persona intensity tracking, context markers, quick actions panel.
